---
title: ""
---

```{=html}
<div class="hero-banner">
  <div class="hero-content">
    <div class="hero-photo">
      <img src="images/selfy.png" alt="Youwei Hu" class="profile-photo"/>
    </div>
    <div class="hero-text">
      <h1 class="hero-name">Youwei Hu</h1>
      <p class="hero-title">Graduate Researcher · Biostatistics & Data Science</p>
      <p class="hero-bio">
        M.S. Biostatistics candidate at Emory University. I build statistical 
        models and interactive visualizations for problems in neurological 
        disease and infectious disease epidemiology.
      </p>
      <div class="hero-buttons">
        <a href="projects.html" class="btn-hero-primary">View Projects</a>
        <a href="about.html" class="btn-hero-secondary">About Me</a>
        <a href="files/CV.pdf" class="btn-hero-secondary">CV</a>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>
```

---

```{=html}
<div class="section-block">
  <h2 class="section-title">Research Interests</h2>
  <div class="interest-tags">
    <span class="tag">Bayesian Hierarchical Modeling</span>
    <span class="tag">EEG Biomarkers</span>
    <span class="tag">Infectious Disease Modeling</span>
    <span class="tag">Data Visualization</span>
    <span class="tag">Interactive Dashboards</span>
  </div>
</div>
```

```{=html}
<div class="section-block">
  <h2 class="section-title">Featured Work</h2>
  <div class="featured-grid">
    <a href="projects.html" class="featured-card">
      <div class="featured-icon">🧠</div>
      <div class="featured-title">EEG Biomarker Dashboard</div>
      <div class="featured-desc">Interactive Shiny app comparing EEG features between MCI and Alzheimer's patients.</div>
    </a>
    <a href="projects.html" class="featured-card">
      <div class="featured-icon">🦠</div>
      <div class="featured-title">Viral Shedding Modeling</div>
      <div class="featured-desc">Bayesian hierarchical model in Stan integrating Ct values and viral load measurements.</div>
    </a>
  </div>
</div>
```
